title: Workflow Body Sections
description: Markdown body sections expected in every workflow file. Not frontmatter — extracted by ingest, never validated by JSON Schema.

## Description.description: One-sentence plain-English summary of what this workflow accomplishes.

## Steps.description: The numbered step-by-step procedure. Each step has a goal, optional code block, and a checkpoint question. Append new steps; preserve existing steps.

## From sources.description: One entry per source wikilink or URL that informed this workflow, describing what it contributed. Append new entries; never duplicate.

## Notes.description: Free-form overflow notes that don't fit a first-class section. Append paragraphs; preserve existing text.
